package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for column_name_literals_duplicated_outside_repository: Repeated column-name strings outside repository or query packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule015NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule015NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule015NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario015Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule015NegativeService, input Rule015NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
